title: pelargonium × bryoniifolium
intro: Pelargonium × bryoniifolium, also known as Red Leaf Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium × bryoniifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × bryoniifolium can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
